rulings.Case Title: SYLVIA CHUKUANI VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. A BUSINESS ENTITY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Of Defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 8, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT continued to July 7, 2016. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies must be delivered to department 501 no later than June 10, 2016 by 9:00 a.m. with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CURTIS, MARTHA INDIVIDUALLY ON HER OWN BEHALF AND VS. GIELING, IMOGENE B. INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Gieling To Allow Further Inspection Of Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 8, 2016, line 3. PLAINTIFF CURTIS, MARTHA INDIVIDUALLY ON HER OWN BEHALF AND Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Gieling To Allow Further Inspection Of Real Property GRANTED. Defendant to provide access and facilitate inspection. Shall any residential tenants refuse entry, Plaintiff may apply for a court order on per-case basis. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MATHIEU VERBEECK VS. MICHELLE MALLIETT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Relief From And To Set Aside Entry Of Dismissal Pursuant To Ccp 473; Mpa; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 8, 2016, line 6. PLAINTIFFS MATHIEU VERBEECK and CATHERINE CREVELS' Motion For Relief From And To Set Aside Entry Of Dismissal Pursuant To Ccp 473 GRANTED as follows: (1) Mandatory relief under CCP 473(b) is granted; (2) Hearing on Defendant's demurrer is re-set for June 21, 2016. (3) First Amended Complaint filed in violation of CC 472 is stricken; (4) Plaintiff shall file and serve opposition to demurrer no later than June 9, 2016 by 4:00 p.m.; (5) Defendant shall file reply no later than June 17, 2016; (6) Jonathan Borstein shall remit to Defendant's counsel $400 in attorney's fees re: April 29, 2016 hearing and appearance no later than June 16, 2016; (7) Jonathan Borstein shall pay $300 to the State Bar Client Security Fund no later than June 16, 2016; (8) by no later than June 17, 2016 Jonathan Borstein shall file a declaration regarding compliance with the payment requirements. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNA WU VS. JAMIL NAJJAR ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 8, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANT YASIN ATTIA's Motion To Compel Discovery GRANTED, responses without objections shall be served within 5 days of notice of entry of order. No sanctions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LAN LE VS. PETER A ABBOTT ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, June 8, 2016, line 8. DEFENDANT PETER ABBOTT's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
